title: specklinia biglandulosa
intro: Specklinia biglandulosa, also known as the Large-flowered Specklinia, is a rare, terrestrial orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its long, thin leaves and white, fragrant flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily to treat respiratory issues, including bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Specklinia biglandulosa include relieving coughs, reducing inflammation, and improving lung function, making it a valuable natural remedy for respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Specklinia biglandulosa can be made by infusing the roots and leaves in hot water to create a tea or by drying the plant to make a powder for inhalation or topical application.
